message:
perf(btree): parse uncached scan cells directly

Avoid round-tripping sequential scan cells through CachedCellSlot when rowid_and_payload_into deliberately bypasses the cell-slot cache.

Mixed OLTP quick F median improved from 487.26 ms baseline to 445.57 ms and 437.63 ms after the change; perf_after_cursor_direct_no_children drops parse_cell_slot_at from the visible top profile.
